name: safer
description: Claude Code plugin: modality-based skills that recalibrate agents toward compiler-grade craft and scope discipline. Eighteen skills across contract, contract-init, contract-migrate, architect, implement (junior/senior/staff), diagnose, spike, research, review-senior, verify, orchestrate, setup, dogfood, docs-reader, stamina, ux-audit. Composes with eslint-plugin-agent-code-guard (lint floor), @chughtapan/safer-spec-development (per-folder living-spec layer), and zapbot (GitHub publish).
